title: More Plates Revamped
description: This mod adds more gears, plates and rods to materials
body:
First of all, make sure to join my discord server if you want! There you'll find news about almost anything I am doing!
Link : https://discord.gg/JZ8H3fryaB

Also thank you Pan for allowing me to port your awesome mod! :) Please go check out the original! Link : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/moreplates

This mod adds Gears, Plates and Rods for a lot of materials, go check out the images section to see some examples!

Currently supported mods :

- All The Modium
- Applied Energistics 2
- Aquaculture 2
- Assembly Line Machines
- Blue Power
- Botania
- Common Mod Metals
- Extended Crafting
- Ice & Fire
- Mekanism
- Minecraft Materials
- Mystical Agradditions
- Mystical Agriculture
- PneumaticCraft: Repressurized
- Powah!
- Project Red
- Psi
- Refined Storage
- Silent's Mechanism
- And so much more I probably forgot about! I will make sure to support more mods in the future
